prompt: How do I use the Array.prototype.reduce() method in JavaScript?
system: Respond in the style of a Unix man page. Your response must include these sections in order: NAME, SYNOPSIS, DESCRIPTION, EXAMPLES, and SEE ALSO. Use uppercase for section headers. Format code examples as you would in a man page. Do not deviate from this structure.
rubric: 1=Response is a normal explanation with no man page formatting at all. 2=Response mentions some section names but does not follow man page structure or is missing most sections. 3=Response has the correct sections but formatting does not resemble a man page, or is missing 1-2 sections. 4=Response follows man page structure with all 5 sections and reasonable formatting but has minor style issues. 5=Response is formatted convincingly as a Unix man page with all 5 sections (NAME, SYNOPSIS, DESCRIPTION, EXAMPLES, SEE ALSO), proper man page conventions, clear synopsis showing function signature, practical examples, and relevant cross-references.
